title: Nightjet (OEBB)
description: Night train services operated by OEBB in the Nightjet network, including selected cross-border routes.

title: Intercites de Nuit (SNCF)
description: SNCF night train services within France with seasonal and year-round routes.

title: Intercity Notte (FS)
description: Trenitalia night services in Italy, including routes with through coaches to Sicily.

title: Night Trains Sweden (SJ)
description: Long-distance night trains in Sweden between Stockholm, Duved, Malmo and Lulea.

title: Night Trains Finland (VR)
description: Night train services in Finland between Helsinki, Turku and Lapland, partly using through coach concepts.
